title: Women Are Changing the Key of Radiohead
content:
For anyone looking for signs of spring, there were plenty to be found at Milan Fashion Week. The shows took place beneath sunny blue skies and drew crowds that dressed accordingly. Attendees sported bright clothes, chest-bearing tops, and sunglasses of all shapes and sizes. For the most part, heavy winter coats seemed a distant memory on the lively streets of Milan. However, there were still notable coats featured prominently on the runways.

At the Bottega Veneta show, designers presented large, shaggy, and leathery outerwear. Meanwhile, the Jil Sander show featured outerwear that was more understated but no less striking. Another striking trend was the high-cut bikini bottoms that models on the Diesel runway wore paired with sweaters and shirts. That show, as well as those held by Marni and Prada, heavily featured attire in various shades of pink. Along with springy yellows and greens, pink was also a prevalent color choice among the stylish crowds outside.
